bead.title: test: harden BYOC control-plane safety proof
bead.description:
Context: FEAT-025/PRD P1 BYOC requires a control plane that provisions and observes deployments without becoming a data-plane bypass. Gap assessment found only partial evidence for tenant isolation, short-lived observation credentials, no entity access through the control plane, and audited administrative actions.

In-scope files: `crates/axon-control-plane/` models/service/http tests and direct implementation required by those tests.
Out-of-scope: real cloud provider provisioning, UI, and data-plane entity APIs.
Implementation hint: add contract tests for tenant-scoped listings, rejection of entity/data-plane operations, credential TTL/expiry shape, and audit events for deployment lifecycle actions.
bead.acceptance:
1. `cargo test -p axon-control-plane` passes.
2. Tests prove control-plane APIs cannot read or mutate tenant entity data.
3. Tests prove tenant-scoped visibility and short-lived observation credential behavior or document an explicit follow-up if credential issuance is not implemented.
4. Administrative lifecycle actions produce auditable evidence or a precise implementation bead is filed.
